data.content: Shipment review approved. Merge commit fce29edec038 (feature commit e7613a5829d0) verified on origin/main. CI green (runs 23601158941, 23601158908). All 6 acceptance criteria met: title column removed, inline title row renders below metadata with truncation, hierarchy/badges preserved, summary panel unchanged. No invariants. Clean, well-scoped diff across 7 files.
